description: A vibrant, nostalgic, high-contrast aesthetic blending 2000s digital maximalism with modern Neo-Brutalism. Expect thick black borders, hard offset shadows, unapologetic primary colors, and bouncy, spring-based physics. This is an anti-AI-slop design: it rejects soft gradients and generic sans-serifs for bold, character-driven typography and stark, unapologetic contrast.

fonts.usage: Body, UI elements, score, timer, inputs, leaderboards

typography.guidelines: Use tracking-tight for Unbounded headings. Use uppercase Space Mono with wide tracking for small labels (e.g., 'MOVES', 'TIME').

visual_enhancers.radii: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-full for pill buttons
visual_enhancers.patterns: Use CSS-based checkerboard patterns or polka dots inside modals or on the card backs. Do not use generic transparency; use dense, opaque blocks.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react in 'fill' or 'duotone' weight. Use playful Y2K motifs: Alien, GameController, Ghost, Lightning, Planet, Rocket, Skull, Smiley, Star.

layouts.general: High-density, bold UI. Use Bento-box style grids for the menu screen. Everything should look like a physical toy or retro OS window.
layouts.header: Solid background, thick bottom border (border-b-[3px] border-[#050505]). NEVER use fully transparent headers.
layouts.spacing_scale: Exaggerated. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped text.

components.button: bg-white text-[#050505] border-[3px] border-[#050505] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#050505] hover:-translate-x-1 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#050505] active:translate-x-1 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all duration-150 font-bold uppercase

card_tile.base: relative w-full aspect-square cursor-pointer transform-style-3d transition-transform duration-500
card_tile.front: absolute inset-0 backface-hidden bg-white border-[3px] border-[#050505] flex items-center justify-center rotate-y-180
card_tile.back: absolute inset-0 backface-hidden bg-[#FFCC00] border-[3px] border-[#050505] flex items-center justify-center pattern-checkerboard

components.input: border-[3px] border-[#050505] p-4 bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#050505] font-mono
components.toast: Use sonner. Customize toast to have border-[3px] border-[#050505] rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#050505] font-mono

motion.card_flip: Framer Motion: { rotateY: 180 } with spring physics (stiffness: 260, damping: 20).
motion.match_reveal: Framer Motion sequence: scale up to 1.15, flash green background, scale down to 1. Rotate slightly (e.g., rotateZ: [-5, 5, 0]).
motion.mismatch: Framer Motion: x shake [-10, 10, -10, 10, 0] with a brief flash of red.
motion.hover_states: Snappy translation (-2px, -2px) and shadow growth. No slow fades.

accessibility.contrast: Extremely high. Black borders guarantee WCAG AAA against light backgrounds.
accessibility.data_test_attributes: MANDATORY. Add data-testid to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='tile-0', data-testid='start-game-btn', data-testid='login-submit').

images.description: Abstract colorful 3D shapes. Use as an accent image on the landing page or auth screens, contained within a brutalist bordered frame.
Background pattern texture. Use selectively inside UI panels or empty state backgrounds with low opacity.
Retro Arcade cabinet. Great for the 404 page, game over screen, or leaderboard hero.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Canvas/ThreeJS is NOT required. Rely on Framer Motion for CSS 3D transforms (rotateY) on the cards. This keeps performance high for mobile puzzle solvers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for tile faces and UI icons.
Implement the font imports inside index.css and apply 'Unbounded' for Headings/Logos and 'Space Mono' for all data, scores, and general text.
Add 'preserve-3d' and 'backface-visibility' utilities in Tailwind if they do not exist natively, or use arbitrary values like `[transform-style:preserve-3d]` and `[backface-visibility:hidden]`.
NEVER use generic soft drop-shadows (e.g., shadow-md). ALWAYS use the hard offset shadows defined in visual_enhancers.
Forms (Login/Signup) should use standard HTML inputs but styled brutally (thick borders, huge padding, mono font).
Game state logic should handle rapid clicking gracefully—prevent clicking a 3rd card while 2 are already animating a flip.
Implement sound effects via the Web Audio API or standard HTML5 Audio, ensuring a toggle exists in the header.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and offset shadows.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style. Here, stick to the thick-border Brutalist style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable, but strip away their Vercel/Stripe soft look in favor of the Neo-Brutalist rules defined above.
Use sonner for toasts. Customize to match the thick-bordered aesthetic.
DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
